channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Blizzard warnings cascade across East Coast with winter stormâs approach
Russia targets Ukraine with 345 drones and missiles, Zelenskyy says
item.description: "Russia will not stop," said Yulia Svyrydenko, the Ukrainian prime minister.

item.title: WATCH: Gen Z is hitting life milestone later, experts say
item.description: Jeffrey Jensen Arnett, professor of psychology at Clark University, explains the new stage of emerging adulthood.

item.title: NASA to start slow-moving process returning moon rocket to hangar this week
item.description: The space agency said Sunday it's targeting Tuesday for the slow, four-mile trek across Kennedy Space Centerâ, weather permitting.

item.title: 2/22: Face The Nation
item.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the Supreme Court struck a blow to President Trump's tariffs, Margaret Brennan spoke to U.S. ...

item.title: Violence erupts after Mexican cartel leader "El Mencho" killed in federal operation
item.description: Mexico's Ministry of Defense security forces killed the leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Nemesio RubÃ©n Oseguera Cervantes, known as "El Me...

item.title: DHS reverses decision to suspend TSA PreCheck and Global Entry due to shutdown
item.description: The reversal came in the wake of criticism by elected leaders and travelers.

item.title: TSA says PreCheck still operational after previous announcement of suspension during funding fight
WATCH: Man shot, killed by Secret Service, local deputy at Mar-a-Lago, agency says
item.description: A man who "appeared" to be armed was shot and killed by Secret Service agents after "unauthorized entry into the secure perimeter at Mar-a-Lago," the ...

item.title: Severe winter storm live updates: 'The worst is yet to come,' NY Gov. Hochul says
item.description: Blizzard conditions are forecast for much of the Northeast.

item.title: Armed man shot and killed after entering secure perimeter of Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service says
item.description: Trump was not there but was at the White House in Washington.

item.title: Maps show winter storm forecast bring snow, blizzard conditions to East Coast
item.description: Blizzard warnings were issued Saturday for New York City, New Jersey, southern New England and coastal communities along the East Coast.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 22)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.
